revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 2일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初二]][[zh:六月初二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 2일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初二]][[zh:六月初二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 2일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初二]][[zh:六月初二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 2일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初二]][[zh:六月初二]]
{{Not to be confused with|June 2|qq=June 2}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=六月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 6월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar June|qq=}} '''June 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|June (Lunisolar)|ja|6月 (旧暦)|lt=June (Minazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 6th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Jōwa (Heian period)|en|Jōwa (Heian period)|qid=Q1075605|lt=Jōwa|1=Jōwa (Heian period)}} ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|July 14|en|July 14|qid=Q2691|lt=July 14|1=July 14}} , {{ill|926|en|926|qid=Q24369|lt=926|1=926}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Murakami|en|Emperor Murakami|qid=Q374015|lt=Murakami|1=Emperor Murakami}} , the 62nd emperor, was born (d. {{ill|967|en|967|qid=Q23699|lt=967|1=967}} ). * Year 9 of {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eishō|1=Eiroku}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 21|en|June 21|qid=Q2671|lt=June 21|1=June 21}} , {{ill|1582|en|1582|qid=Q6719|lt=1582|1=1582}} ) – The {{ill|Honnō-ji Incident|en|Honnō-ji Incident|qid=Q169598|lt=Honnō-ji Incident|1=Honnō-ji Incident}} occurred. * Year 1 of {{ill|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|ja|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiwa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1146161}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|June 30|en|June 30|qid=Q2657|lt=June 30|1=June 30}} , {{ill|1764|en|1764|qid=Q7659|lt=1764|1=1764}} ) – The era changed to Meiwa; Go-Sakuramachi ascended the throne. * Year 1 of Meiwa (Gregorian calendar June 30, 1764) – Nagasaki to Shanghai submarine telegraph cable opened, marking Japan's first international telegraph service. * Year 3 of {{ill|Jōō (Edo period)|en|Jōō (Edo period)|qid=Q1145081|lt=Jōō|1=Jōō (Edo period)}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 21|en|July 21|qid=Q2727|lt=July 21|1=July 21}} , {{ill|1654|en|1654|qid=Q6970|lt=1654|1=1654}} ) – The {{ill|Tamagawa Aqueduct|en|Tamagawa Aqueduct|qid=Q1014298|lt=Tamagawa Aqueduct|1=Tamagawa Aqueduct}} was completed.
== Births == * Year 4 of {{ill|Enchō|en|Enchō|qid=Q1327274|lt=Enchō|1=Enchō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 14|en|July 14|qid=Q2691|lt=July 14|1=July 14}} , {{ill|926|en|926|qid=Q24369|lt=926|1=926}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Murakami|en|Emperor Murakami|qid=Q374015|lt=Emperor Murakami|1=Emperor Murakami}} , the 62nd emperor (d. {{ill|967|en|967|qid=Q23699|lt=967|1=967}} ) * Year 6 of [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 19|en|July 19|qid=Q2726|lt=July 19|1=July 19}} , {{ill|1794|en|1794|qid=Q7811|lt=1794|1=1794}} ) – {{ill|Mizuno Tadakuni|en|Mizuno Tadakuni|qid=Q2975848|lt=Mizuno Tadakuni|1=Mizuno Tadakuni}} , Edo Bakufu rōjū who led the Tenpō Reforms (d. {{ill|1851|en|1851|qid=Q7656|lt=1851|1=1851}} )
== Deaths == * Year 2 of {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|August 3|en|August 3|qid=Q2786|lt=August 3|1=August 3}} , {{ill|1635|en|1635|qid=Q6879|lt=1635|1=1635}} ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} revised the {{ill|Buke shohatto|en|Buke shohatto|qid=Q289817|lt=Buke shohatto|1=Buke shohatto}} , enforcing alternate attendance (Sankin-kōtai). * Year 10 of {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|qid=Q1192853|lt=Tenbun|1=Tenbun}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 9|en|August 9|qid=Q2782|lt=August 9|1=August 9}} , {{ill|1541|en|1541|qid=Q6516|lt=1541|1=1541}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiharu|en|Ashikaga Yoshiharu|qid=Q536313|lt=Ashikaga Yoshiharu|1=Ashikaga Yoshiharu}} , 12th Ashikaga shogun, died (b. {{ill|1511|en|1511|qid=Q6188|lt=1511|1=1511}} ).
== Commemorations == * Fire Festival of the Yi people * Anniversary of the Port Opening of Nagasaki
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|6|1|6|3|5|2|7|6|0602|qq=}}
